description: Style NoteA great shoe for casual days out, the Spider-Man shoe from marvel makes for a perfect addition to your little one's wardrobe. With a soft canvas upper, cushioned footbed and grippy outsole, you are assured that your little one has their feet firm on the ground.Product DetailsWhite and blue synthetic leather upper and overlays for flexibility and durabilityPadded tongue and collar for snug comfortMidfoot Velcro straps with branding for a custom FitPadded footbed with fabric inner lining for sweat-free comfortAppliqued cartoon on the lateral midfootDurable rubber outsole strategically grooved for absolute grip and tractionMaterial and CareRubber, TPUWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
